summary: Iteration 8 regression smoke: AuthContext logout comment-only change has no behavioral impact. Backend auth endpoints (login/me/logout) return 200. Frontend full smoke passes: login as admin, dashboard renders in ₹, orders/products/invoices/expenses/payments/business-profile all load without errors, and sidebar Logout clears session and redirects to /login.
passed: UI login as admin succeeds and redirects to /app
Dashboard renders ₹ symbol; no '₹$' double-symbol occurrences
/app/orders, /app/products, /app/invoices, /app/expenses, /app/payments all load with zero '$' chars and no error elements
/app/business-profile loads (5 '$' chars observed appear to be non-currency template text — no '₹$' doubles, no error elements)
Sidebar Logout button (1 found) clicked → session cleared → redirected to /login
